title: Crispy Paleo Potato Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, using paleo ingredients and crispy potato shells.
instructions: Cut the potatoes into 1/4-inch thick rounds.
Place the potato rounds in a bowl and drizzle with coconut oil.
Sprinkle savory and salt over the potatoes, and toss to coat.
Lay the potatoes out in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the potatoes are baking, mix together cilantro and lime juice in a bowl.
Once the potatoes are done, let them cool for a few minutes.
Use the crispy potato shells to make tacos, and fill with your favorite toppings.
